title: Rkhvdlome3H7Ul357Ls82B26Nauxu9
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Dry Bulk Report, global steel production totaled approximately 143.6 million tons in September. This is down month-on-month by 1.2 million tons (-1%) and is 5.7 million tons (-4%) less than was reported last year for September 2023's production. Steel production outside of China totaled approximately 66.5 million tons last month.
